overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside an elevated metro train cabin traveling through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape during golden hour. The camera moves smoothly between towering glass skyscrapers with neon accents, capturing the transition from sunlit exteriors to darker urban canyons. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced lighting and detailed architectural elements characteristic of Night City.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from inside a metro train cabin during golden hour, with warm sunlight illuminating the glass facades of distant skyscrapers. The train moves forward along elevated tracks, revealing a distinctive red and white striped industrial tower ahead. The cabin frame remains visible throughout, grounding the perspective as the urban landscape unfolds.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon transit corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: train passes the red and white striped tower, which moves from center view to the left side and recedes
natural sunlight diminishes as the train enters the shadow of taller buildings, transitioning to mixed artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing the metro journey, watching the striped tower pass by and entering the denser urban core

entered.detail: tall office building with illuminated windows and geometric facade patterns
enclosed walkway bridge connecting two buildings across the transit corridor
large digital advertisement display with glowing neon elements

segments.scene_description: The train passes the prominent striped industrial tower, which dominates the center view before receding to the left. The environment transitions from open sky to a denser urban canyon, with a pedestrian skybridge becoming visible ahead. Lighting shifts from direct golden hour sun to a mix of natural and artificial sources as the train penetrates deeper into the downtown core.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown canyon with surrounding mega-structures

events.description: train passes under a covered pedestrian skybridge spanning the transit corridor

agents.ego_description: traveling through the densest part of the city, surrounded by towering structures and neon signage

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway interchange with glowing vehicle trails
massive arcology-style building with intricate surface details and illuminated windows
skyscraper facade accented with vibrant purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The train enters the densest section of the urban canyon, where skyscrapers block most of the natural light and artificial neon illumination dominates. The train passes under a pedestrian skybridge while elevated highways and mega-structures surround the transit corridor. The environment feels enclosed and immersive, with the metro track leading deeper into the heart of the futuristic metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a metro train as it travels from a sun-drenched skyline into the shadowed depths of a dense cyberpunk urban canyon. It begins inside the cabin during golden hour, moving forward along elevated tracks toward a distinctive red and white striped industrial tower illuminated by warm sunlight. As the train passes the tower, the open sky recedes and the environment shifts toward a denser downtown core, where the lighting transitions from direct sun to a mix of natural and artificial sources. The scene then penetrates deeper into the city, passing under a pedestrian skybridge as towering skyscrapers block the remaining daylight. Finally, the view becomes fully enclosed by mega-structures and elevated highways, with vibrant neon illumination dominating the immersive heart of the metropolis.
